Class Order

java.lang.Object
org.neo4j.cypherdsl.core.ast.TypedSubtree<SortItem>
org.neo4j.cypherdsl.core.Order
All Implemented Interfaces:
Visitable
@API(status=STABLE, since="1.0") public final class Order extends TypedSubtree<SortItem>
Represents the list of sort items that make up the order of records in a result set.
Since:
1.0
Author:
Gerrit Meier, Michael J. Simons
